debug_info.goal:
a : ℕ+ → ℤ
hi : ∀ (j : ℕ+), 1 ≤ a j ∧ a j ≤ 2015
hii : ∀ (l k : ℕ+), 1 ≤ k ∧ k < l → ↑↑k + a k ≠ ↑↑l + a l
⊢ ∃ b N, ∀ (m n : ℕ+), m < n ∧ N ≤ m → |∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, (a j - ↑↑b)| ≤ 1007 ^ 2

failed_attempts:
-- Proved using helper infrastructure in P6Work.lean, P6Helpers.lean, P6Helpers2.lean
  obtain ⟨hfin, hcard⟩ := imo6_M_finite_bounded a hi hii
  set p := (imo6_M a).ncard with hp_def
  have hp_le : p ≤ 2014 := hcard
  have hb_pos : 0 < 1 + p := by omega
  obtain ⟨L, N, hN⟩ := imo6_partial_sum_bounded a hi hii hfin hcard
  refine ⟨⟨1 + p, hb_pos⟩, N, fun m n ⟨hmn, hNm⟩ => ?_⟩
  have hNn : N ≤ n := le_trans hNm (le_of_lt hmn)
  have hn_bound := hN n hNn
  have hm_bound := hN m hNm
  rw [imo6_sum_split _ m n hmn]
  show |∑ j ∈ Icc 1 n, (a j - (1 + ↑(imo6_M a).ncard)) -
    ∑ j ∈ Icc 1 m, (a j - (1 + ↑(imo6_M a).ncard))| ≤ 1007 ^ 2
  have hamgm : (↑(p * (2014 - p)) : ℤ) ≤ (1007 : ℤ) ^ 2 := by
    exact_mod_cast imo6_amgm p hp_le
  rw [abs_le]
  constructor <;> linarith [hn_bound.1, hn_bound.2, hm_bound.1, hm_bound.2]
